name: aimock
description: Mock everything your AI app talks to — LLM APIs, MCP, A2A, AG-UI, vector DBs, search. One package, one port, zero dependencies.
summaryZh: Mock everything your AI app talks to — LLM APIs, MCP, A2A, AG-UI, vector DBs, search. One package, one port, zero dependencies. 这是偏模型能力或模型封装的项目，适合作为能力底座持续观察。
whyItMatters: 最近仍在高频更新，仓库成熟度和社区基础都不错。
fitFor: 适合在持续跟踪 AI 开源趋势时作为重点观察对象。
